title: Persistent Bits
body: Persistent Bits is a mod focused on **Vanilla-like** Chunk Loading. Chunks loaded with Persistent Bits are forced using the vanilla `/forceload` command, and will auto-load on restart. **Machines, Crops and more will not update!** - Persistent Bits uses the _Vanilla_ Force-Loading mechanic that does not tick the blocks in a given chunk, hence why Persistent Bits doesn't either!
